things.name: Victoria Peak (The Peak)
things.description: Iconic tram ride to Hong Kong's highest point for the world's most breathtaking urban skyline view

things.name: Star Ferry Cross-Harbour Trip
things.description: Take the historic Star Ferry across Victoria Harbour for unrivalled views of the skyline — only HK$4

things.name: Tian Tan Big Buddha & Ngong Ping
things.description: The 34-metre seated bronze Buddha on Lantau Island — reach it by cable car or scenic bus

things.name: Temple Street Night Market
things.description: Kowloon's atmospheric night market with fortune tellers, Cantonese opera and great street food

things.name: Wong Tai Sin Temple
things.description: Vibrant Taoist temple complex with fortune-telling stalls, incense and beautiful gardens

things.name: Hong Kong Museum of History
things.description: The Story of Hong Kong — free entry to explore 6,000 years of history including the colonial era

things.name: Mong Kok Markets
things.description: Flower Market, Bird Market, Ladies Market and Goldfish Market — the real Hong Kong shopping experience

things.name: Cheung Chau Island
things.description: Car-free island 35 minutes by ferry with seafood restaurants, beaches and the famous bun festival

things.name: Ladies Street & Jade Market
things.description: Nathan Road's shopping corridor and the covered Jade Market with hundreds of jade and gemstone stalls

things.name: Dim Sum Breakfast
things.description: Experience authentic yum cha at a traditional teahouse — steamed dumplings, har gow and cheung fun
